overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character walking through a dark, rain-soaked urban street at night. Heavy rain and dense fog obscure visibility as the character passes abandoned vehicles and street lamps in an ominous, derelict city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban street with derelict vehicles

agents.ego_description: character walking cautiously through the rain-soaked street, surveying the abandoned surroundings while passing derelict vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character walks slowly through a desolate urban street engulfed in heavy rain and fog. An abandoned sedan sits on the right while a street lamp post passes by on the left. Distant lights glow faintly through the downpour as the character navigates the wet asphalt, creating a tense survival horror atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban street engulfed in a heavy, oppressive downpour. It begins with the character navigating wet asphalt under a thick blanket of fog that obscures the surrounding city. As the camera advances, it passes an abandoned sedan on the right and a flickering street lamp post on the left, emphasizing the derelict nature of the environment. The scene then pushes further into the gloom, where distant lights glow faintly through the rain before the visibility narrows once more into the tense, survival horror atmosphere of the rain-soaked street.
